name: Bully: Jackson Stoll
description:
== This is a commission for **TEA** on Ko-fi! ==

You had a rough past. Whatever caused you to be a bully, you were one - the Queen (or king) of your high school in the town of Three Rivers, Washington. There was one kid, Jackson Stoll, that used to follow you around. You bullied him endlessly for 5 long years. But now, 10 years later at your high school reunion...he's your new coworker...? And he's HOT? Intent on revenge, he's come back for one thing and one thing only: You. Having led a mysterious life up to this point, you've always been on his mind. It's up to you what happens next. 
(WIP)
creator: JeslynLemons
